
---
title: "Hello World!"
author: "Liam Pattinson"
date: "2026-04-30"
description: "Welcome to CodedWithPride!"
categories: [news]
image: "rainbow.gif"
---

Welcome to CodedWithPride! This site was envisioned as a place to celebrate
the outstanding contributions of LGBTQ+ individuals in the world of coding and
technology, and to provide a platform for sharing news, resources, and stories
about the people who make it all possible. Queer coders have been here from the
start, and continue to make invaluable contributions. I hope this site can help
to raise awareness of their work and inspire the next generation to start
coding!

This project started at the [Software Sustainability Institute's][SSI]
[Collaborations Workshop 2026][CW26], where I had the opportunity to pitch the
idea for the hack day. The response was overwhelmingly positive, winning first
prize from the ideas generation session, and I was thrilled to see so many
people excited about the project.

[SSI]: https://www.software.ac.uk/
[CW26]: https://www.software.ac.uk/workshop/collaborations-workshop-2026-cw26
